final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with a lower estimated credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that savings are very low, because it serves as a foundational feature in personal credit assessments, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the checking account is overdrawn, because it exhibits a substantially higher estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
저축 잔액이 거의 없음은 일반적으로 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다. [2]
계좌 잔액 부족은 높은 위험 신호로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 분류합니다. [3]
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
